symbols: altar with fire — the place of sacrifice and worship
white-robed figures — purity and consecration for ritual worship
grove of tall trees — the sacred precinct, reminiscent of high places
procession of figures — the liturgical approach to the divine
description: A grove of tall trees — some birch-like with golden autumn leaves, others dark evergreens — frames a grassy clearing. At the left, a stone altar or pedestal stands with a flame burning on it. Two white-robed figures prostrate themselves before the altar. In the distance at the right, a procession of additional white-robed figures walks in a line between the trees. The light is golden and autumnal. The sea or a lake is visible through the trees at either side. The atmosphere is one of hushed, reverential ritual.
